name: Brickell / Financial District
employers: Microsoft LATAM, JP Morgan, Citadel, hedge funds, fintech startups
amenities: Brickell City Centre, waterfront, MetroMover, restaurants
thesis: Rentas top del condado pero cap rate comprimido limita yield. Supply limitado protege contra oversupply. Ideal para capital preservation, no para cash flow agresivo.
thesisEn: Top rents in the county but compressed cap rate limits yield. Limited supply protects against oversupply. Ideal for capital preservation, not aggressive cash flow.

name: Downtown Miami
employers: Miami WorldCenter, Brightline, cruise lines, hospitality
amenities: Bayside, AAA, Brightline Station, Perez Art Museum
thesis: OVERSUPPLY MASIVO. 8,000+ unidades entrando saturarán el mercado. Vacancia proyectada >11%. Solo considerar si price/unit cae 20%+ en 2026-2027.
thesisEn: MASSIVE OVERSUPPLY. 8,000+ units entering will saturate the market. Projected vacancy >11%. Only consider if price/unit drops 20%+ in 2026-2027.

name: Edgewater
employers: Spillover from Brickell/Wynwood, creative agencies, tech
amenities: Margaret Pace Park, waterfront, proximity to Wynwood/Design District
thesis: Mayor apreciación del urban core (+110%). Waterfront gentrification activa. Rent growth sólido. The Hamilton se vendió aquí a $688K/unit — benchmark. Buena relación yield/apreciación.
thesisEn: Highest appreciation in urban core (+110%). Active waterfront gentrification. Solid rent growth. The Hamilton sold here at $688K/unit — benchmark. Good yield/appreciation ratio.

name: Wynwood / Design District
employers: Art galleries, tech startups, WeWork, Spotify office, creative industry
amenities: Wynwood Walls, Design District luxury retail, restaurants, nightlife
thesis: Mejor brand del condado. Rent growth #2 en urban core. SIN FLOOD ZONE = insurance 40% menor que coastal. Apreciación récord (+130%). Price/unit todavía debajo de replacement cost.
thesisEn: Best brand in the county. Rent growth #2 in urban core. NO FLOOD ZONE = 40% lower insurance than coastal. Record appreciation (+130%). Price/unit still below replacement cost.

name: Midtown Miami
employers: Midtown retail, nearby Wynwood/Design District employers
amenities: Midtown Miami shops, Target, Publix, restaurants, central location
thesis: Ubicación central entre Wynwood y Edgewater. Sin flood risk. Price/unit más accesible que vecinos. Upside significativo si gentrification de Wynwood sigue expandiendo.
thesisEn: Central location between Wynwood and Edgewater. No flood risk. More accessible price/unit than neighbors. Significant upside if Wynwood gentrification keeps expanding.

name: Little Havana
employers: Small business, restaurants, healthcare, proximity to downtown/Brickell
amenities: Calle Ocho, Domino Park, cultural hub, affordable dining
thesis: MEJOR RELACIÓN YIELD/APPRECIATION del condado. Cap rate alto (6%+), rent growth #1 (+6.2%), sin flood zone, debajo de replacement cost. Gentrification temprana — comprar AHORA.
thesisEn: BEST YIELD/APPRECIATION RATIO in the county. High cap rate (6%+), rent growth #1 (+6.2%), no flood zone, below replacement cost. Early gentrification — buy NOW.

name: Overtown
employers: Jackson Health System, proximity to downtown
amenities: Historic Overtown, Lyric Theater, Red Rooster
thesis: Redevelopment masivo con River District (1,600 units). Alto riesgo pero precios mínimos. Opportunity Zone = tax benefits. Crime bajando pero sigue siendo concern.
thesisEn: Massive redevelopment with River District (1,600 units). High risk but minimum prices. Opportunity Zone = tax benefits. Crime declining but still a concern.

name: Allapattah
employers: Rubell Museum, Produce market, healthcare, light industrial
amenities: Rubell Museum, proximity to Wynwood, authentic restaurants
thesis: RENT GROWTH MÁS ALTO DEL METRO (+7.1%). Spillover directo de Wynwood con precios 50% menores. Sin flood zone. Rubell Museum ya ancla la gentrification.
thesisEn: HIGHEST RENT GROWTH IN THE METRO (+7.1%). Direct spillover from Wynwood at 50% lower prices. No flood zone. Rubell Museum already anchors gentrification.

name: Miami Beach / South Beach
employers: Tourism, hospitality, entertainment, Art Basel ecosystem
amenities: Ocean Drive, Lincoln Road, South Pointe, beaches
thesis: Insurance es ASESINO ($2,800/unit). Sea level rise = riesgo a largo plazo. Rentas bajando. Millage bajo pero insurance lo compensa con creces.
thesisEn: Insurance is KILLER ($2,800/unit). Sea level rise = long-term risk. Rents declining. Low millage but insurance more than compensates.

name: Coconut Grove
employers: University of Miami, tech companies, CocoWalk retail
amenities: CocoWalk, marinas, parks, Vizcaya Museum, UM campus
thesis: Premium estable con escasez natural. Entry price alto limita el upside. Ideal para capital preservation. Tenants de alto ingreso = baja rotación.
thesisEn: Stable premium with natural scarcity. High entry price limits upside. Ideal for capital preservation. High-income tenants = low turnover.

name: Coral Gables
employers: UM, Bacardi, Baptist Health, MasTec, many corporate HQs
amenities: Miracle Mile, Venetian Pool, Biltmore Hotel, top schools
thesis: Trophy asset territory. Escuelas A+, income alto, crime bajo. Zoning restrictivo limita supply = protección natural. Pero cap rate comprimido y entry price elevado.
thesisEn: Trophy asset territory. A+ schools, high income, low crime. Restrictive zoning limits supply = natural protection. But compressed cap rate and high entry price.

name: Key Biscayne
employers: Limited local, residents commute to Brickell/Downtown
amenities: Crandon Park, Bill Baggs, exclusive island lifestyle
thesis: Ultra-premium island. NO es inversión de yield — es wealth preservation. Insurance astronomical. Cap rate más bajo del condado. Solo para UHNW.
thesisEn: Ultra-premium island. NOT a yield investment — it's wealth preservation. Astronomical insurance. Lowest cap rate in the county. UHNW only.

name: Aventura
employers: Aventura Mall (top 5 US), retail, medical offices
amenities: Aventura Mall, parks, proximity to beaches
thesis: TAXES MÁS BAJOS DEL CONDADO ($1.57/SF). Sin flood zone. Crime bajo. Schools buenos. Aventura Mall genera empleo masivo. Balance perfecto entre seguridad y yield.
thesisEn: LOWEST TAXES IN THE COUNTY ($1.57/SF). No flood zone. Low crime. Good schools. Aventura Mall generates massive employment. Perfect balance of safety and yield.

name: Sunny Isles Beach
employers: Tourism, international trade, real estate
amenities: Beachfront, Russian/LATAM community, luxury towers
thesis: Demanda internacional fuerte (LATAM + Eastern Europe). Pero insurance VE zone mata el yield. Rents estancándose. Solo atractivo si insurance baja.
thesisEn: Strong international demand (LATAM + Eastern Europe). But VE zone insurance kills the yield. Rents stagnating. Only attractive if insurance drops.

name: North Miami
employers: FIU Biscayne Bay, MOCA, healthcare, retail
amenities: MOCA, Oleta River State Park, FIU campus
thesis: Price below replacement cost ($350K+). Rent growth sólido. FIU campus genera demanda constante. Millage alto (22.50) pero compensado con rent growth.
thesisEn: Price below replacement cost ($350K+). Solid rent growth. FIU campus generates constant demand. High millage (22.50) but compensated by rent growth.

name: North Miami Beach
employers: Retail corridors, healthcare, proximity to Aventura Mall
amenities: Eastern Shores, Greynolds Park, improving retail
thesis: Value-add sweet spot. Precios muy debajo de replacement cost. Demographics mejorando. Rent growth #4 entre suburbios. Competencia manejable.
thesisEn: Value-add sweet spot. Prices well below replacement cost. Improving demographics. Rent growth #4 among suburbs. Manageable competition.

name: Miami Gardens
employers: Hard Rock Stadium, Amazon warehouse, FedEx, healthcare
amenities: Hard Rock Stadium (NFL), Calder Casino, parks
thesis: POBLACIÓN MÁS GRANDE suburbana (112K). Workforce housing demand enorme. Cap rate alto. Sin flood. Hard Rock Stadium y Amazon = employment anchors.
thesisEn: LARGEST SUBURBAN POPULATION (112K). Enormous workforce housing demand. High cap rate. No flood. Hard Rock Stadium and Amazon = employment anchors.

name: Hialeah
employers: Hialeah Park Racing, hospitals, manufacturing, small business hub
amenities: Hialeah Park, Westland Mall, MetroRail access, cultural identity
thesis: SEGUNDA CIUDAD MÁS GRANDE de Miami-Dade (221K). Workforce demand masiva. Vacancia bajísima (3.5%). MetroRail access. Precios todavía debajo replacement cost.
thesisEn: SECOND LARGEST CITY in Miami-Dade (221K). Massive workforce demand. Very low vacancy (3.5%). MetroRail access. Prices still below replacement cost.

name: Hialeah Gardens
employers: Proximity to Doral corporate, warehousing, logistics
amenities: Parks, family-oriented community
thesis: Low entry, no flood, growing community. Millage razonable. Pipeline casi inexistente = no competition. Proximity a Doral sin los precios.
thesisEn: Low entry, no flood, growing community. Reasonable millage. Almost nonexistent pipeline = no competition. Proximity to Doral without the prices.

name: Doral
employers: World Fuel Services, Carnival Corp, Univision, Amazon, Kia
amenities: CityPlace Doral, Trump National Doral, Dolphin Mall, MIA proximity
thesis: Corporate hub con appreciation récord (+100%). PERO pipeline de 1,500+ units preocupa. Precios se acercaron a replacement cost. Rent growth desacelerando.
thesisEn: Corporate hub with record appreciation (+100%). BUT pipeline of 1,500+ units is concerning. Prices approached replacement cost. Rent growth decelerating.

name: Sweetwater / FIU Area
employers: FIU (58,000 students), Dolphin Mall, nearby Doral corporates
amenities: FIU campus, Dolphin Mall, Tamiami Trail restaurants
thesis: FIU con 58,000 estudiantes es un demand engine permanente. Precios MUY debajo de replacement cost. Rent growth fuerte. Student + workforce housing hybrid.
thesisEn: FIU with 58,000 students is a permanent demand engine. Prices WELL below replacement cost. Strong rent growth. Student + workforce housing hybrid.

name: Kendall / The Crossings
employers: Baptist Hospital, retail, professional services
amenities: Dadeland Mall, The Falls, suburban family living
thesis: Estable, family-oriented, safe. Pero cap rate moderado y walk score bajo. Rent growth lento. No hay upside dramático. Ideal para investor conservador.
thesisEn: Stable, family-oriented, safe. But moderate cap rate and low walk score. Slow rent growth. No dramatic upside. Ideal for conservative investor.

name: Pinecrest
employers: Professional services, medical, proximity to Dadeland
amenities: Pinecrest Gardens, top schools, family luxury
thesis: NO HAY MULTIFAMILY PERMITIDO. Solo single-family homes. Incluido como referencia de las mejores escuelas del condado.
thesisEn: Ultra-premium residential. Best schools in Miami-Dade. Very high income. Extremely limited multifamily inventory. Trophy residential, not yield play.

name: Palmetto Bay / Cutler Bay
employers: Baptist South, retail, professional services
amenities: Black Point Marina, Deering Estate, family suburbs
thesis: Estable, safe, family. Pipeline mínimo. Pero limited upside y walk score bajo. Good for conservative buy-and-hold.
thesisEn: Stable, safe, family. Minimal pipeline. But limited upside and low walk score. Good for conservative buy-and-hold.

name: Homestead
employers: Homestead Air Reserve Base, agriculture, Amazon, distribution centers
amenities: Everglades proximity, Homestead Speedway, affordable living
thesis: MAYOR APRECIACIÓN del condado (+115%) y precios MÁS BAJOS ($140K/unit). Cap rate 7% posible. Sin flood. Workforce migration masiva. La frontera del crecimiento.
thesisEn: HIGHEST APPRECIATION in the county (+115%) and LOWEST PRICES ($140K/unit). 7% cap rate possible. No flood. Massive workforce migration. The growth frontier.

name: Florida City
employers: Agriculture, distribution, Homestead Air Reserve Base
amenities: Gateway to Keys, Everglades, basic amenities
thesis: PRECIOS MÍNIMOS del condado ($110K/unit) con cap rate máximo (7.5%). Pero crime grade D+ es el peor del condado. Millage altísimo (24.0).
thesisEn: LOWEST PRICES in the county ($110K/unit) with maximum cap rate (7.5%). But D+ crime grade is worst in county. Very high millage (24.0).

name: Liberty City / Brownsville
employers: Jackson Health System, proximity to downtown
amenities: Historic neighborhood, community gardens, improving infrastructure
thesis: Opportunity Zone con beneficios fiscales significativos. Crime ha bajado dramáticamente. Precios de entry mínimos. Pero todavía high-risk.
thesisEn: Opportunity Zone with significant tax benefits. Crime has dropped dramatically. Minimum entry prices. But still high-risk.

name: Little Haiti / Upper East Side
employers: Magic City Innovation District, creative economy, restaurants
amenities: Little Haiti Cultural Complex, Caribbean culture, emerging restaurants
thesis: SEGUNDA MAYOR APRECIACIÓN (+120%) después de Wynwood. Gentrification rápida — spillover directo de Edgewater y Wynwood. Magic City Innovation District catalyst.
thesisEn: SECOND HIGHEST APPRECIATION (+120%) after Wynwood. Rapid gentrification — direct spillover from Edgewater and Wynwood. Magic City Innovation District catalyst.

name: Opa-locka
employers: Opa-locka Executive Airport, warehousing, distribution
amenities: Moorish architecture, airport, limited retail
thesis: MILLAGE MÁS ALTO del condado (26.50) — taxes devoran el yield. Crime grade D. Pero precios son los más bajos ($100K/unit). Turnaround play ultra high-risk.
thesisEn: HIGHEST MILLAGE in the county (26.50) — taxes devour the yield. D crime grade. But prices are the lowest ($100K/unit). Ultra high-risk turnaround play.

name: Surfside / Bal Harbour
employers: Bal Harbour Shops (luxury retail), tourism
amenities: Bal Harbour Shops, beaches, exclusive dining
thesis: Ultra-luxury coastal. Post-Champlain Tower, building codes strictest en FL. No new supply. Insurance astronomical. Wealth preservation only.
thesisEn: Ultra-luxury coastal. Post-Champlain Tower, strictest building codes in FL. No new supply. Astronomical insurance. Wealth preservation only.

name: South Miami
employers: South Miami Hospital, University of Miami, professional services
amenities: Sunset Place, UM campus proximity, Metrorail access
thesis: Establecida, safe, walkable. UM proximity genera demand. Pero limited upside e inventory escaso. Good hold, not exciting buy.
thesisEn: Established, safe, walkable. UM proximity generates demand. But limited upside and scarce inventory. Good hold, not an exciting buy.

name: Westchester / Tamiami
employers: FIU, retail, professional services, Tamiami Airport
amenities: Tropical Park, FIU proximity, established community
thesis: Below replacement cost, no flood, limited pipeline. FIU growth drives demand. Established Cuban-American community. Steady, unsexy, profitable.

name: Miami Lakes
employers: Graham Companies, Carnival Corp HQ (nearby), retail
amenities: Main Street, lakes, planned community feel, family-friendly
thesis: Planned community de Graham Companies. Family-friendly con schools buenos. Millage razonable. Pero no hay upside explosivo. Stable cash flow play.
thesisEn: Planned community by Graham Companies. Family-friendly with good schools. Reasonable millage. But no explosive upside. Stable cash flow play.

name: Medley / Hialeah Industrial
employers: Industrial zone
amenities: N/A
thesis: Zona industrial pura. No hay multifamily. Incluida por completitud. Dato útil: genera empleo para workforce en zonas residenciales cercanas.
thesisEn: Industrial/commercial hub. Very limited residential. High millage. Small population. Only for specialized industrial-adjacent multifamily plays.
